title: Microcase
content:
{{Top|ncl}}
{{Cut|canon=1|Star Wars drafts}}
'''Microcases''', also spelled "micro-cases" and called "micro-packs" were large cases that could be carried on the back of an adult [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]].

[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] hid [[Biggs Darklighter/Legends|Biggs]] and [[Windy Starkiller|Windy]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia's]] two brothers, in hollowed out microcases, and put them into hibernation using a [[Power cell/Legends|power pack]] from [[Kane Starkiller]]'s chest cavity.

The shell of the microcase resisted scanners, making it easier for Luke to get his companions to safety in them.

==Behind the scenes==
The avoidance of scanners by hiding someone in a microcase eventually became the secret compartments on board the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']], that resisted the the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] scanner equipment.
